title: Modilla Modpack
description: The perfect modpack for those who want to experience Minecraft in its purest form, but with more depth, variety, and excitement.
body:
![Thumbnail + Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f861ba6e0dff2bb13b95fc0c669f5824f312cdd7.png)

## Summary
This modpack adds many new biomes, structures and animals that enhance the Minecraft experience.
It's perfect for those who want to experience Minecraft in its purest form, but with more depth, variety, and excitement.

## Features
- countless new biomes in the overworld, nether and the end
- many new vanilla friendly structures
- 20 new hostile and friendly mobs
- ender dragon fight overhaul
- immersive sound physics
- vanilla friendly furniture
